documents.content:
Remote Work Policy

Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. All remote employees must be available on Slack during core hours, 10am-4pm local time. Expense reimbursement for home office equipment is capped at $500 per year.

Vacation Policy

Full-time employees accrue 15 days of paid vacation per year. Unused vacation days roll over up to a maximum of 5 days into the next year. Vacation requests must be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance.

Expense Reimbursement Policy

All business expenses must be submitted within 30 days with itemized receipts. Meals during business travel are reimbursed up to $75 per day. Airfare must be booked in economy class unless the flight exceeds 6 hours.

cases.question: How many days per week can employees work remotely?
How many vacation days do full-time employees accrue per year?
What is the daily meal reimbursement limit during business travel?
What is the annual cap on home office equipment reimbursement?
